sqlMap.select: SELECT SUBSTR(REGDATE, 0, 7) REGDATE , SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + DRAFTENDCNT + RETURNCNT) DRAFTCNT , SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + SUSININGCNT) DRAFTINGCNT , SUM(DRAFTENDCNT + SUSINENDCNT) DRAFTENDCNT , SUM(RETURNCNT) RETURNCNT FROM EZSTATISTICS.TBDAILYDOCCOUNTLOG B JOIN EZHRMASTER.TBLDEPTMASTER A ON B.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND B.DeptID = A.CN WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE < #endDate# AND A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #company# GROUP BY SUBSTR(REGDATE, 0, 7)

SELECT REGDATE , A.CN , A.DISPLAYNAME , NVL(DRAFTENDCNT, 0) DRAFTENDCNT , CASE WHEN DRAFTENDCNT > 0 THEN ROUND(DTIME / DRAFTENDCNT, 2) ELSE 0 END DTIME FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLDEPTMASTER A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUBSTR(REGDATE, 0, 7) REGDATE , DEPTID , SUM(DRAFTENDCNT) DRAFTENDCNT , SUM(DRAFTTIME * DRAFTENDCNT) DTIME, TENANT_ID FROM EZSTATISTICS.TBDAILYDOCCOUNTLOG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE < #endDate# GROUP BY SUBSTR(REGDATE, 0, 7), DEPTID, TENANT_ID ) B ON B.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND B.DEPTID = A.CN WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND B.DEPTID = #searchID# AND DTIME != '0' AND REGDATE IS NOT NULL ORDER BY A.CN, REGDATE, DTIME DESC

SELECT REGDATE , B.FORMID, A.FORMNAME AS FORMINFO, NVL(DRAFTCNT, 0) AS DRAFTCNT, NVL(DRAFTINGCNT, 0) AS DRAFTINGCNT, NVL(DRAFTENDCNT, 0) AS DRAFTENDCNT, NVL(RETURNCNT, 0) AS RETURNCNT FROM EZAPPROVAL_$company$.TBFORMINFO A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT SUBSTR(REGDATE,0,7) AS REGDATE, FORMID, SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + DRAFTENDCNT + RETURNCNT) AS DRAFTCNT, SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + SUSININGCNT) AS DRAFTINGCNT, SUM(DRAFTENDCNT + SUSINENDCNT) AS DRAFTENDCNT, SUM(RETURNCNT) AS RETURNCNT, TENANT_ID FROM EZSTATISTICS.TBDAILYFORMCOUNTLOG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE < #endDate# GROUP BY SUBSTR(REGDATE,0,7), FORMID, TENANT_ID ) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.FORMID = B.FORMID INNER JOIN EZAPPROVAL_$company$.TBFORMCONTAINER C ON A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.FORMCONTID = C.FORMCONTID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND REGDATE IS NOT NULL AND B.FORMID = #searchID# AND (DRAFTCNT != 0 OR DRAFTINGCNT != 0 OR DRAFTENDCNT != 0 OR RETURNCNT != 0) ORDER BY FORMID, REGDATE, DRAFTCNT DESC

SELECT REGDATE , A.DISPLAYNAME , NVL(DRAFTCNT, 0) DRAFTCNT , NVL(DRAFTINGCNT, 0) DRAFTINGCNT , NVL(DRAFTENDCNT, 0) DRAFTENDCNT , NVL(RETURNCNT, 0) RETURNCNT , A.CN FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER A JOIN ( SELECT SUBSTR(REGDATE, 0, 7) REGDATE , USERID , SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + DRAFTENDCNT + RETURNCNT) DRAFTCNT , SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + SUSININGCNT) DRAFTINGCNT , SUM(DRAFTENDCNT + SUSINENDCNT) DRAFTENDCNT , SUM(RETURNCNT) RETURNCNT, TENANT_ID FROM EZSTATISTICS.TBDAILYDOCCOUNTLOG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE < #endDate# GROUP BY SUBSTR(REGDATE, 0, 7), USERID, TENANT_ID ) B ON B.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND B.USERID = A.CN AND REGDATE IS NOT NULL WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND B.USERID = #searchID# AND ( DRAFTCNT != 0 OR DRAFTINGCNT != 0 OR DRAFTENDCNT != 0 OR RETURNCNT != 0 ) ORDER BY USERID, REGDATE, DRAFTCNT DESC

SELECT A.FORMID, CASE WHEN #lang# = 1 THEN B.FORMNAME ELSE B.FORMNAME2 END AS FORMINFO FROM EZSTATISTICS.TBDAILYFORMCOUNTLOG A JOIN EZAPPROVAL_$company$.TBFORMINFO B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.FORMID = B.FORMID JOIN EZAPPROVAL_$company$.TBFORMCONTAINER C ON A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.FORMCONTID = C.FORMCONTID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE < #endDate# $searchList$ GROUP BY A.FORMID, B.FORMNAME, B.FORMNAME2 ORDER BY B.FORMNAME, B.FORMNAME2
